$schema: Comprehensive Integration + Production Readiness master TODO list. Each row maps to a tracked gap in production-readiness.json, the wave-integration audit, or the deferred-items audit. Status pills are driven by docs/status/update-status.mjs derivations.
_currentTaskRule: When an agent (or human) is actively working a TODO, they set `currentTask` to the active item's id + a one-line description. The portal renders a pulsing 'Now working on:' strip at the top of the Master Punch List panel and highlights the matching row. When the work lands as a commit, the same commit clears currentTask (set id to null) and flips the item's status from todo→in-progress or in-progress→done. The cron + post-commit hook propagate within seconds. Set currentTask to null when idle.

categories.name: PROD — Production Readiness (P1-P14)
categories.description: 14 production-readiness categories. Each track in production-readiness.json shows the per-category history.

items.title: HIPAA Compliance Artifacts — SRA, BAA registry, audit-log 6-yr retention, breach playbook, workforce training log, KMS rotation
Security Automation — Semgrep + CodeQL SAST, Snyk/Dependabot, gitleaks, CycloneDX SBOM, OWASP ZAP DAST
DR + Backup — Postgres PITR, cross-region replica, quarterly drill, RTO ≤ 1h / RPO ≤ 5 min
Observability — OTel tracing, Sentry, structured logs, SLO defs, PagerDuty routing, status.cernia.io
Performance — k6 voice latency p99 < 1.2s; FHIR Bulk Data at N tenants; noisy-neighbor; regression gate
Tenant Lifecycle — suspend/unsuspend/delete/export/billing-failure→grace→suspend/tier-downgrade
CI/CD Hardening — branch protection, CODEOWNERS, blue-green/canary deploy, rollback automation
EHR Migration Validation — Epic/Cerner/Athena real sample dumps; installer end-to-end; per-EHR runbook
Browser + A11y Breadth — Chromium/Firefox/WebKit/Edge matrix + axe-core WCAG-AA on every page
Clinical Safety — CDS-rule audit + ML bias/fairness + SaMD doc + clinical advisory sign-off
FinOps — per-tenant LLM tokens / voice minutes / storage GB / compute minutes + margin per tier
FHIR Conformance — Inferno/Crucible + SMART App Launch cert + Da Vinci HRex/PDex + openapi-diff CI gate
Customer-Facing — status.cernia.io, support ticketing, in-app help, sign-up funnel + trial→paid
Mobile Distribution — Android+iOS bundles, App Store/Play Store listings, MDM, push notifications
